---
title: "Marketing Strategy & Campaign Portfolio"
---

## Featured Campaign Strategy

### LA Galaxy Fan Engagement Strategy

A strategic campaign concept focused on strengthening Gen Z fan loyalty through experiential 
engagement, digital storytelling, and insight-driven marketing initiatives.

This project demonstrates applied sports marketing strategy and brand positioning development.

<a href="lagalaxy.html" class="primary-link">View Full Case Study →</a>


## Strategic Marketing Analyses

<div class="strategy-grid">

<div class="strategy-card">
<div class="strategy-tag">Corporate Strategy</div>
<h3>Tesla Corporate Strategy Analysis</h3>
<p>Sustainability positioning, leadership influence, and competitive strategy evaluation.</p>
<a href="tesla.html" class="secondary-link">View Analysis →</a>
</div>

<div class="strategy-card">
<div class="strategy-tag">Organizational Strategy</div>
<h3>Google Organizational Behavior Analysis</h3>
<p>Innovation culture, motivation systems, and organizational performance analysis.</p>
<a href="google.html" class="secondary-link">View Analysis →</a>
</div>

<div class="strategy-card">
<div class="strategy-tag">Brand Strategy</div>
<h3>Super Soaker Brand Strategy</h3>
<p>Consumer insight-driven brand positioning and experiential marketing concept.</p>
<a href="soackerz.html" class="secondary-link">View Analysis →</a>
</div>

</div>
